statement: In every magma, Equation 2578 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * z)) * w`) implies Equation 2931 (`x = ((y * (x * z)) * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0897
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x z)) w) x)
